meaning: n.类似风琴的六角形的乐器
examples: Remember to clear concertina sections out when you come back from trips to avoid your unwashed briefs billow out onto the boardroom table.
The all new collection from Blood Stream, with a 3d concertina background.
If I could get that dressmaker to make a concertina skirt like Susy Nagle's.
The concertina and armed patrols suggest that Bigelow is up to something unusual, something expensively unusual and quite sensitive.
It was supposed to be a convertible, but the concertina metal bits that supported the canvas top were too rusted to fold back.
